steps.expected: Login form displayed with company code field
steps.observed: Login form displayed with email, password, and company code fields

steps.action: Verify login form has company code input
steps.expected: Company code input bound to companyCode

steps.action: Submit login with email, password, companyCode
steps.observed: curl test confirmed payload format: {"email":"<email>","password":"<password>","companyCode":"SKE"} returns 200 with accessToken, refreshToken, companyCode

steps.action: Verify successful login redirects to correct route

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/auth/login -> 200 with {tokenType, accessToken, refreshToken, expiresIn, companyCode, displayName, mustChangePassword}

assertions.title: Invalid stored sessions are cleared before the protected shell is shown

steps.action: Store invalid test tokens in localStorage

steps.expected: App validates session, clears invalid storage, redirects to /login

steps.observed: Invalid tokens remain in localStorage (minor issue - routing is correct but storage not cleared)

evidence.network: No explicit session validation API call observed - app appears to check token presence client-side and redirect before making API calls

assertions.issues: Storage not cleared when invalid tokens detected - tokens remain in localStorage after redirect to login. Routing behavior is correct (protected routes inaccessible), but stale tokens persist in storage.

assertions.title: Role-resolved entry points and protected deep links land users in the correct shell

steps.observed: Redirected to /superadmin - Dashboard shows platform controls (Tenants, Platform Roles, Tenant Runtime, etc.)
Redirected to /hub - Portal hub shows Admin, Accounting, Sales, Factory options
Redirected to /hub - Dealer portal accessible at /dealer

steps.action: Admin attempts to access /superadmin (protected deep link)
steps.expected: Blocked and redirected to permitted destination
steps.observed: Admin redirected from /superadmin to /hub (correct blocking behavior)

evidence.network: All login requests completed successfully with correct routing

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. VAL-SESSION-001 confirmed login form shows company code input and submits {email, password, companyCode}. VAL-SESSION-003 confirmed invalid sessions are blocked from protected routes (redirect to /login), though stale tokens persist in localStorage. VAL-CROSS-001 confirmed role-based routing: superadmin -> /superadmin, multi-portal admin -> /hub, dealer -> /hub with /dealer accessible. Protected deep links correctly block unauthorized access (admin blocked from /superadmin, redirected to /hub).
